questionHtml:
How many moles of carbon dioxide are produced by the complete combustion of 7.0 g of ethene, C2H4 (g)?

Mr = 28


A.  0.25

B.  0.5

C.  0.75

D.  1.0

meta.title: How many moles of carbon dioxide are produced by the complete combustion of 7.0 g of ethene, C2H4 (g)? Mr = 28 A. 0.25 B. 0.5 C. 0.75 D. 1.0
